enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on New Year's Eve 2016 from his Boulder home. He spent the day helping his mom reorganize cables on her TVs, received five surround sound speakers and $30 in payment, and returned home to continue reorganizing his own room — which he had neglected since moving in. He also describes drilling a hole between rooms for outlets, capturing Google Earth screenshots of bike racer routes to wallpaper his room, and dealing with a slow video upload.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: feels good to finally clear out the clutter he let pile up after moving in
happy to help but treats it as casual paid labor ($30)
